title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils for Those with Hormonal Imbalances Suffering from Oily Hair
description: Camellia sinensis essential oils, derived from the leaves of the tea plant, can be a game-changer for oily hair. The oil is rich in properties such as antioxidants, anti-inflammatory compounds, and essential fatty acids, particularly oleic and linoleic acid. These constituents help to balance the scalp's natural oil production, reducing sebum buildup and oiliness. The antioxidants also help to neutralize free radicals that can cause hair to become greasy and weighed down. To use Camell...
